scenes.text:
Every problem you face is
a business opportunity in disguise.

The best businesses in the world were born from frustration. Uber exists because Travis Kalanick could not get a cab. Airbnb exists because two guys could not
afford rent. Every time you are frustrated by something, write it down. That frustration is a market signal telling you what people will pay to solve.

Stop consuming problems and start solving them. The person who solves a problem for one million
people becomes a millionaire. It is that simple. Find the pain point and build the painkiller.

Entrepreneurs do not avoid
problems. They monetize them.

What problem do you wish someone would solve? Maybe
you should build it. Follow for business ideas.
